items.title_zh: 我一直在 Claude Code 中使用 Artifacts 来完成所有事情：棘手的 co 的视觉解释......
items.description: I've been using Artifacts in Claude Code for everything: visual explanations of tricky code, system diagrams, quick previews of a few animation options, data analyses and dashboards I share with the team. They are a game changer for how I…
items.description_zh: 我一直在 Claude Code 中使用 Artifacts 来完成所有事情：棘手代码的可视化解释、系统图表、一些动画选项的快速预览、数据分析和我与团队共享的仪表板。他们改变了我的游戏规则……

items.title: It took us a lot of iterations to find the right pattern for this.
items.title_zh: 我们经过多次迭代才找到合适的模式。
items.description: It took us a lot of iterations to find the right pattern for this. Early on we were very naive and we thought that the agent could one shot project updates without much input from users. That approach ended up creating a bunch of slop, bec…
items.description_zh: 我们经过多次迭代才找到合适的模式。早期我们非常天真，我们认为代理可以在没有用户太多输入的情况下一次性完成项目更新。这种方法最终产生了一堆污水，因为……

items.title: it is making the right choice from a range of plausible options along many dimensions wit…
items.title_zh: 它在多个维度上从一系列看似合理的选项中做出了正确的选择……
items.description: it is making the right choice from a range of plausible options along many dimensions with limited information... when a chess or go player intuits a move without calculating, they are exercising taste https://t.co/044iRz1wQf
items.description_zh: 它是在信息有限的情况下，从多个维度的一系列看似合理的选项中做出正确的选择……当国际象棋或围棋棋手未经计算就凭直觉走一步时，他们正在锻炼品味 https://t.co/044iRz1wQf

items.title: did you know LLMs secretly refer to our prompts as human slop?
items.title_zh: 你知道LLM私下里把我们的提示称为“人类的污渍”吗？
